failed_attempts.sql:
WITH latest_match AS (
  SELECT p.id AS profile_id, pub.id AS publication_id
  FROM profile p
  JOIN publication_collab pc ON p.id = pc.profile_id
  JOIN publication pub ON pc.publication_id = pub.id
  WHERE p.username = 'fluminensefc'
 ORDER BY pub.published_at DESC
 LIMIT 1
)
SELECT profile_id, publication_id FROM latest_match
